General.Name: NorCom Information Technology GmbH & Co. KGaA
General.Description: NorCom Information Technology GmbH & Co. KGaA develops and implements big data and KI solutions in Germany and internationally. The company offers DaSense, an AI technology platform that can analyze documents and initiate and support workflows; AI apps, an applications or software programs that use artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning to perform specific tasks; and AI large language model to understand and generate natural language. It serves GovTech, Legal Tech, and Industrie sectors. NorCom Information Technology GmbH & Co. KGaA was founded in 1989 and is based in Munich, Germany.
